summary: Cartography complete: 31 tool files mapped with per-action affordance specifications for TOOL-AFFORDANCES lane
detail: Full map at .build/rig-relay/cartography/tool-affordances-map.v1.json. Key discoveries: (1) NextAffordance infrastructure already exists in typed-result.ts but plugin tools bypass it, (2) 10+ ad-hoc hint/next fields already exist but are inconsistent, (3) Recommended hybrid approach: add `next` to JSON output + extend toolCategory() in infrastructure.
